description: Goal: source publication owns scope facts, not recursive quoted-tree rewriting. Signal: source_publish reads expanded scope fragments, reserves names, applies forms, and publishes facts, while item-macro expansion itself lives behind QuotedExpander; publication no longer carries its own recursive macro/sugar walker; direct source and Fz.Compiler.define remain one raw publication transaction. Strategy: after QuotedExpander exists, route item-macro handling and any other scope-tier expansion through it, keep publish_scope focused on reserve/apply/publish work, and delete the remaining expansion logic from ScopeSession.
title: Compiler2 source publication: consume expanded scope fragments only
